rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §33.053, which governs fingerprinting of children in schools. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A missing child prevention and identification program may include a procedure for taking the fingerprints of each student registered in the school whose parent or legal custodian has consented in writing to the fingerprinting.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change; no conflict detected.
